ranked_movies.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned across multiple threads for its iconic and hilarious scenes, including the Killer Rabbit and the Black Knight. Consistently ranked as a top comedy film.

ranked_movies.title: Caddyshack
ranked_movies.reason: Repeatedly cited as one of the most iconic sports comedies. Its humor and characters are considered timeless and foundational to the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Widely recommended as a quintessential comedy with rapid-fire jokes and absurd situations. Often listed among the greatest comedies of all time.

ranked_movies.title: The Naked Gun
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned for its over-the-top slapstick humor and memorable death scenes. A cornerstone of the parody genre.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a top-tier comedy that influenced future works. Its satirical take on the Western genre is considered groundbreaking.

ranked_movies.title: Happy Gilmore
ranked_movies.reason: Often brought up in discussions about iconic sports comedies. Adam Sandler's performance is cited as a highlight of 90s comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Major League
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended as a classic and iconic sports comedy with a great cast and memorable quotes.

ranked_movies.title: Dr. Strangelove
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a high-ranking comedy that is both intelligent and hilarious. Often considered one of the best films ever made, regardless of genre.

ranked_movies.title: A Fish Called Wanda
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as a brilliantly cast and executed comedy. Mentioned in multiple threads for its sharp writing and performances.

ranked_movies.title: Spaceballs
ranked_movies.reason: Often listed in recommendations for 80s comedies and parodies. Its sci-fi spoof humor has a dedicated following.

ranked_movies.title: Young Frankenstein
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a Mel Brooks classic and a top-tier comedy film. Its parody of the horror genre is highly praised.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Lebowski
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a cult classic with a unique comedic style. Its characters and quotes are frequently referenced.

ranked_movies.title: Tropic Thunder
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned for its sharp satire of Hollywood and memorable scenes. Often cited as a modern comedy classic.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a brilliant horror-comedy from Edgar Wright. Its unique blend of genres and witty humor is highly praised.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Fuzz
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested alongside Shaun of the Dead for its action-comedy blend and clever writing. Another Edgar Wright highlight.

ranked_movies.title: Superbad
ranked_movies.reason: Often listed as a favorite modern comedy, especially from the 2000s. Its relatable humor and characters resonate with many viewers.

ranked_movies.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
ranked_movies.reason: Cited for its iconic scenes and family vacation humor. The Christmas Vacation edition is especially highlighted.

ranked_movies.title: This Is Spinal Tap
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a brilliant mockumentary and one of the best comedies of the 80s. Its influence on the genre is significant.

ranked_movies.title: Dodgeball
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a popular and hilarious sports comedy. Its absurd premise and quotable lines are frequently referenced.

ranked_movies.title: The Sandlot
ranked_movies.reason: Often brought up in sports comedy discussions for its nostalgic and charming take on childhood baseball.
